eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Olmsted, MN; at 8:50 AM on JAN 16, 2019 Effective until 9:05 AM JAN 17, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test of the Emergency Alert System for city of Rochester and Olmsted County.� The test was conducted using city of Rochester's DisasterLAN IPAWS communication system.� This is only a test.
